# Basa Prasad Portfolio

Portfolio of Basa Prasad, a detail-oriented BCA student, Fullstack Web Developer, and Remote Professional specializing in React, NestJS, Node.js, TypeScript, data automation scripting, and customer support.

## Summary of Skills
- **Fullstack Web Engineering**: React.js, NestJS, Node.js, TypeScript, SQL databases (PostgreSQL), RESTful API architectures.
- **Backend & Data Automation**: Coded Node.js automation scripts, Google Sheets API, database auditing, and record management with 100% integrity.
- **Helpdesk CS & VA Operations**: Freshdesk ticketing systems, email/chat support workflows, standard operating procedures, and professional inbox coordination.

## Experience
- **Fullstack Web Projects**: Created React dashboards backed by type-safe NestJS server frameworks and PostgreSQL databases.
- **ETL Data Automation**: Configured automation scripts in Node.js to scan, audit, and sync 500+ record datasets.
- **Support Simulation**: Managed multi-channel ticketing escalation simulations on helpdesk platforms (Freshdesk/Zendesk).
